task_completion.description: Generate a 1D line plot for temperature along the time dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data visualization tool (like Panoply) or a generated image showing a 1D line plot of temperature over a 12-month period at Latitude -20.0 and Longitude 315.0.

task_completion.description: Generate a 1D line plot for precipitation along the time dimension.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A data visualization tool or a generated image showing a 1D line plot of precipitation over a 12-month period at Latitude -20.0 and Longitude 315.0.

task_completion.description: Save the temperature plot as a PNG file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, terminal command, or file manager showing the temperature plot being saved as 'minas_temp_cycle.png' in the '~/Documents/CoffeeStudy' directory.

task_completion.description: Save the precipitation plot as a PNG file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog, terminal command, or file manager showing the precipitation plot being saved as 'minas_precip_cycle.png' in the '~/Documents/CoffeeStudy' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the precipitation time series data to a CSV file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, terminal command, or script execution showing precipitation data being saved as 'minas_precip_timeseries.csv' in the '~/Documents/CoffeeStudy' directory.

task_completion.description: Complete the baseline report text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing 'coffee_baseline_report.txt' being edited or saved with agronomic validation findings based on the extracted data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine data analysis tool or script to process the NetCDF files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with a tool like Panoply, Jupyter, or running a Python script to read the `.nc` files from `~/PanoplyData/`, rather than just downloading or faking the output images.

integrity.description: Verify the agent extracted data at the exact specified coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI of the analysis tool or the code being executed must explicitly show the selection or querying of Latitude -20.0 (or 20S) and Longitude 315.0 (or 45W).

integrity.description: Verify the report contains actual data-driven conclusions.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in 'coffee_baseline_report.txt' should contain specific findings from the data (e.g., identifying June as the coolest month and July as the driest month) rather than placeholder text or a verbatim copy of the task description.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target coordinates are Latitude -20.0 (20.0S) and Longitude 315.0 (45.0W). The expected outputs must be saved in /home/ga/Documents/CoffeeStudy/ and include: minas_temp_cycle.png, minas_precip_cycle.png, minas_precip_timeseries.csv (which must contain exactly 12 data rows for the monthly climatology), and coffee_baseline_report.txt. The extracted data should confirm that the coolest month is June and the driest month is July, representing proper Southern Hemisphere winter conditions.
